title: SourcedValue
description: The reusable provenance envelope $ref'd by every fact-bearing field (TRUST-01, DATA-09). A field is fact-bearing if and only if its schema uses this $ref. Phase 1 enforces only the STRUCTURAL claim-type shape; pass-counting and the transcription re-read record are added by the Phase 2 verification gate.

sources.description: One or more source ids resolved against sources.json. uniqueItems is true so a corroborable fact citing ["off","off"] cannot satisfy minItems 2; lineage-level distinctness remains a Phase 2 concern.

confidence.description: Curator certainty (TRUST-02); GRADE 4-point enum kept in sync with meta.json confidenceLevels.

evidence.description: Evidence strength (TRUST-02); GRADE 4-point enum kept in sync with meta.json evidenceLevels.

updated.description: Date this record was last updated.

checkedOn.description: Optional; REQUIRED for regulatory facts by the TRUST-06 referential gate (plan 01-05), rendered by the macro (plan 01-07).

claimType.description: corroborable: an empirical claim about the world (structurally requires >=2 distinct sources). authoritative: what a named authority states (>=1 source).

claimDomain.description: Optional discriminator the TRUST-06 gate keys on; claimDomain "regulatory" triggers the GB-source + checkedOn rule in the referential gate.

verification.description: The inline verification record (D-01): a fact's value and the evidence someone checked it live in one git diff. Publication status is DERIVED from this record every build (D-03), never author-set.

passes.description: Verification EVENTS, not sources (D-02). The gate counts passes whose verdict is confirms, never the length of sources[].

reviewerKind.description: The reader-independence axis (D-06); a kind, not a reviewer identity.

sourcesChecked.description: Source ids this pass actually checked; each must be a subset of the fact's sources (enforced by the 02-03 gate).

checkedValue.description: What THIS pass actually read; any type. Compared across passes for cross-pass value divergence (R-04).

verdict.description: The outcome of this verification event.

checkedOn.description: Date this pass was performed; the max confirms checkedOn is the fact's last-verified date.

adjudication.description: Human-only adjudication (D-04); absent until adjudicated. AI never writes a verdict.

correctedValue.description: The human-approved corrected value (R-03/D-04); present when outcome is corrected. Any type, and nullable.

contested.description: Present only when adjudication.outcome is contested (D-14). The singular value is withheld while contested; the positions carry the content.

value.description: One contested position's value; any type.

markedWrong.description: Human-only; forces continuous withdrawal on the next build (D-03/VRFY-04).

stalenessClass.description: Optional override of the derived staleness class (D-16).

verificationStatus.description: Derived-only (D-03): publication status is computed from the verification record every build, so any author-set value is rejected by Ajv. Only null validates.

publicationStatus.description: Derived-only (D-03): publication status is computed from the verification record every build, so any author-set value is rejected by Ajv. Only null validates.

measure.description: A pass's STRUCTURED measure (D-13). Comparison is exact-match-or-disagree, so a per-100g and a per-100ml pass auto-raise a disagreement rather than merging.

basis.description: The quantity basis of the measured value.

state.description: Whether the figure is as-sold or as-prepared.

unit.description: Optional unit (for example g, mg, ml, kcal, percent) for the cross-pass value-divergence check (R-04).

jurisdiction.description: Optional jurisdiction the measure speaks for.

asOf.description: Optional date the measure was in effect.
